A.title: Explorer
A.description: You seek novelty and experiences. You're always looking for the next adventure and thrive on discovering new places, ideas, and opportunities. Your curiosity drives you forward, and you're not afraid to step outside your comfort zone.

B.title: Planner
B.description: You value structure and clarity. You feel most comfortable when you have a plan and know what to expect. Your organized approach helps you achieve your goals efficiently, and you find satisfaction in completing tasks methodically.

C.title: Thinker
C.description: You are analytical and reflective. You enjoy deep conversations and spending time with your thoughts. You value knowledge and understanding, often taking time to consider all angles before making decisions.

D.title: Connector
D.description: You thrive on relationships. Your strength lies in bringing people together and building meaningful connections. You're empathetic, social, and find fulfillment in helping others and being part of a community.
